text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP enables machines to grasp the meaning behind text, including emotions and context. This technology powers many everyday tools. For example, translation services can convert entire paragraphs from one language to another almost instantly. Sentiment analysis allows companies to determine whether customer reviews are positive or negative. Finally, chatbots use NLP to have conversations with users, answering questions or helping with tasks in a natural, human-like way.
